_meta: TODO(stream-5): batch-file tickets for each suppression before CI enforcement. Each globalComponentLibrary entry and route suppression must reference a tracking issue.

globalComponentLibrary.description: Ensure an element's role supports its ARIA attributes
globalComponentLibrary.reason: Systemic library-level issue — tracked for remediation

globalComponentLibrary.description: Ensure elements with an ARIA role that require child roles contain them
globalComponentLibrary.reason: Systemic library-level issue — tracked for remediation

globalComponentLibrary.description: Ensure every ARIA input field has an accessible name
globalComponentLibrary.reason: Systemic library-level issue — tracked for remediation

globalComponentLibrary.description: Ensure all ARIA attributes have valid values
globalComponentLibrary.reason: Systemic library-level issue — tracked for remediation

globalComponentLibrary.description: Ensure interactive controls are not nested as they are not always announced by screen readers or can cause focus problems for assistive technologies
globalComponentLibrary.reason: Systemic library-level issue — tracked for remediation

globalComponentLibrary.description: Ensure attributes that begin with aria- are valid ARIA attributes
globalComponentLibrary.reason: Systemic library-level issue — tracked for remediation

globalComponentLibrary.description: Ensure elements with an ARIA role that require parent roles are contained by them
globalComponentLibrary.reason: Systemic library-level issue — tracked for remediation

globalComponentLibrary.reason: Systemic library-level issue — tracked for remediation

globalComponentLibrary.description: Ensure buttons have discernible text
globalComponentLibrary.reason: Systemic library-level issue — tracked for remediation

globalComponentLibrary.description: Ensure that every form element has a visible label and is not solely labeled using hidden labels, or the title or aria-describedby attributes
globalComponentLibrary.reason: Systemic library-level issue — tracked for remediation

globalComponentLibrary.reason: Systemic library-level issue — tracked for remediation
